domain: Chinese 24 solar terms (24-jieqi, UNESCO 2016 intangible heritage; ancient agricultural calendar divided into 24 ~15-day stages aligned with sun's 15° ecliptic positions; 4 seasons × 6 sub-stages; each stage specifies optimal farming task; phenological signals like insect awakening + rain water + frost descent cue stage transitions; cyclical annual schedule)
specific_mechanism: JIEQI-24-STAGE-CURRICULUM: 24-stage cyclical pretraining curriculum with phenological-signal gating. (1) Partition pretraining schedule into 24 stages j ∈ {1, ..., 24}, each ~ 1/24 of training budget; aligned with loss-curve descent. (2) Stage j has data mixture m_j tied to 'season' role: foundation S1-S6 (broad web), instruction-tune S7-S12 (synthetic Q&A), alignment S13-S18 (preference data), reasoning S19-S24 (chain-of-thought). (3) Stage transition gated by phenological canary signal: perplexity-on-canary-set drops below threshold_j (e.g., 'frost-descent' cue = math-benchmark loss crosses δ_19 → enter Reasoning Stage). (4) Cyclical reset: after S24, restart at S1 with refined-data + reset LR to η_max/2 (multi-year cyclical curriculum). (5) Adaptive stage duration: each stage extends if phenological canary doesn't trigger; total schedule self-adjusts.
llm_application: JIEQI-24-STAGE-CURRICULUM 24-stage cyclical training schedule + phenological canary-perplexity gating + seasonal data mixture rotation + multi-year cyclical reset. Differs from R407 + R410 (different training-method instances). R432 SONGLINE-CURRICULUM (different — songline-based). R446 OTEA-APARIMA (different — paired). R458 AIKIDO-KATA (different — kata progressive — closest, but no 24-stage cyclical). R464 ARNIS-FLOW (different — modal flow-drill). Differs from Curriculum Learning LLM Pretraining 2601.21698 (curriculum dynamics analysis — closest, but no 24-stage cycle). Beyond Random Sampling 2506.11300 (curriculum sampling, different schedule). Multi-stage pretraining web→quality (2 stages, not 24). LR decay + curriculum 2511.18903. Differs by 24-STAGE CYCLICAL SCHEDULE + PHENOLOGICAL CANARY GATING + SEASONAL DATA MIXTURE ROTATION + MULTI-YEAR CYCLICAL RESET.
novelty_claim: Curriculum Learning + Beyond Random Sampling + Multi-stage Pretraining cover staged-curriculum paradigm. JIEQI-24-STAGE-CURRICULUM adds (a) 24-stage cyclical schedule + (b) phenological canary-perplexity-threshold gating + (c) cyclical reset. Recombination — borderline lookup.
